# halo2_ecc::fields::fp2 - Rust

Module [halo2\_ecc](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/index.html)
::[fields](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/fields/index.html)
::[fp2](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/fields/fp2/index.html#)
![Copy item path](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/clipboard.svg)


[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_ecc/fields/fp2.rs.html#1-131)
 · [\[−\]](javascript:void(0) "collapse all docs")

[Structs](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/fields/fp2/index.html#structs)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[Fp2Chip](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/fields/fp2/struct.Fp2Chip.html "halo2_ecc::fields::fp2::Fp2Chip struct")

Represent Fp2 point as `FieldVector` with degree = 2 `Fp2 = Fp[u] / (u^2 + 1)` This implementation assumes p = 3 (mod 4) in order for the polynomial u^2 + 1 to be irreducible over Fp; i.e., in order for -1 to not be a square (quadratic residue) in Fp This means we store an Fp2 point as `a_0 + a_1 * u` where `a_0, a_1 in Fp`

---

    U: [From](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.From.html "trait core::convert::From")
<T>,

const: [unstable](https://github.com/rust-lang/rust/issues/88674 "Tracking issue for const_convert")
 · [source](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/src/core/convert/mod.rs.html#725)
[](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/fields/vector/struct.FieldVectorChip.html#method.into)

#### fn [into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html#tymethod.into)
(self) -> U

Calls `U::from(self)`.

That is, this conversion is whatever the implementation of `[From](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.From.html "From") <T> for U` chooses to do.

<U> for Twhere

#### fn [into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html#tymethod.into)
(self) -> U

Calls `U::from(self)`.

That is, this conversion is whatever the implementation of `[From](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.From.html "From") <T> for U` chooses to do.

[Structs](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/fields/fp12/index.html#structs)

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[Fp12Chip](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/fields/fp12/struct.Fp12Chip.html "halo2_ecc::fields::fp12::Fp12Chip struct")

Represent Fp12 point as FqPoint with degree = 12 `Fp12 = Fp2[w] / (w^6 - u - xi)` This implementation assumes p = 3 (mod 4) in order for the polynomial u^2 + 1 to be irreducible over Fp; i.e., in order for -1 to not be a square (quadratic residue) in Fp This means we store an Fp12 point as `\sum_{i = 0}^6 (a_{i0} + a_{i1} * u) * w^i` This is encoded in an FqPoint of degree 12 as `(a_{00}, ..., a_{50}, a_{01}, ..., a_{51})`

[Functions](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/fields/fp12/index.html#functions)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[mul\_no\_carry\_w6](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/fields/fp12/fn.mul_no_carry_w6.html "halo2_ecc::fields::fp12::mul_no_carry_w6 fn")

multiply Fp2 elts: (a0 + a1 \* u) \* (XI0 + u) without carry

# ComparableEcPoint in halo2_ecc::ecc - Rust

Enum [halo2\_ecc](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/index.html)
::[ecc](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/ecc/index.html)
::[ComparableEcPoint](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/ecc/enum.ComparableEcPoint.html#)
![Copy item path](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/clipboard.svg)


[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_ecc/ecc/mod.rs.html#90-93)
 · [\[−\]](javascript:void(0) "collapse all docs")

    pub enum ComparableEcPoint<F: PrimeField, FC: FieldChip<F>> {
        Strict(StrictEcPoint<F, FC>),
        NonStrict(EcPoint<F, FC::FieldPoint>),
    }

Expand description

An elliptic curve point where the x-coordinate has already been constrained to be reduced or not. In the reduced case one can more optimally compare equality of x-coordinates.

Variants[](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/ecc/enum.ComparableEcPoint.html#variants)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### [](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/ecc/enum.ComparableEcPoint.html#variant.Strict)

### [](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/ecc/enum.ComparableEcPoint.html#variant.NonStrict)
`NonStrict([EcPoint](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/ecc/struct.EcPoint.html "struct halo2_ecc::ecc::EcPoint") <F, FC::[FieldPoint](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/fields/trait.FieldChip.html#associatedtype.FieldPoint "type halo2_ecc::fields::FieldChip::FieldPoint") >)`

# ec_add_unequal in halo2_ecc::ecc - Rust

Function [halo2\_ecc](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/index.html)
::[ecc](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/ecc/index.html)
::[ec\_add\_unequal](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/ecc/fn.ec_add_unequal.html#)
![Copy item path](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/clipboard.svg)


[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_ecc/ecc/mod.rs.html#152-178)
 · [\[−\]](javascript:void(0) "collapse all docs")

    pub fn ec_add_unequal<F: PrimeField, FC: FieldChip<F>>(    chip: &FC,    ctx: &mut Context<F>,    P: impl Into<ComparableEcPoint<F, FC>>,    Q: impl Into<ComparableEcPoint<F, FC>>,    is_strict: bool) -> EcPoint<F, FC::FieldPoint>

Expand description

If `is_strict = true`, then this function constrains that `P.x != Q.x`. If you are calling this with `is_strict = false`, you must ensure that `P.x != Q.x` by some external logic (such as a mathematical theorem).

[Assumptions](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/ecc/fn.ec_add_unequal.html#assumptions)

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   Neither `P` nor `Q` is the point at infinity (undefined behavior otherwise)

---

# ScalarField in halo2_base::utils - Rust

Trait [halo2\_base](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/index.html)
::[utils](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/utils/index.html)
::[ScalarField](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/utils/trait.ScalarField.html#)
![Copy item path](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/clipboard.svg)


[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/utils.rs.html#14-34)
 · [\[−\]](javascript:void(0) "collapse all docs")

    pub trait ScalarField: FieldExt + Hash {
        fn to_u64_limbs(self, num_limbs: usize, bit_len: usize) -> Vec<u64>;
        fn to_bytes_le(&self) -> Vec<u8>;
    
        fn from_bytes_le(bytes: &[u8]) -> Self { ... }
    }

Expand description

Helper trait to represent a field element that can be converted into [u64](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/std/primitive.u64.html "u64")
 limbs.

Note: Since the number of bits necessary to represent a field element is larger than the number of bits in a u64, we decompose the integer representation of the field element into multiple [u64](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/std/primitive.u64.html "u64")
 values e.g. `limbs`.

Required Methods[](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/utils/trait.ScalarField.html#required-methods)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/utils.rs.html#20)

#### fn [to\_u64\_limbs](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/utils/trait.ScalarField.html#tymethod.to_u64_limbs)
(self, num\_limbs: [usize](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/std/primitive.usize.html)
, bit\_len: [usize](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/std/primitive.usize.html)
) -> [Vec](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/alloc/vec/struct.Vec.html "struct alloc::vec::Vec")
<[u64](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/std/primitive.u64.html)
\>

Returns the base `2<sup>bit_len</sup>` little endian representation of the [ScalarField](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/utils/trait.ScalarField.html "ScalarField")
 element up to `num_limbs` number of limbs (truncates any extra limbs).

Assumes `bit_len < 64`.

*   `num_limbs`: number of limbs to return
*   `bit_len`: number of bits in each limb

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/utils.rs.html#23)

#### fn [to\_bytes\_le](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/utils/trait.ScalarField.html#tymethod.to_bytes_le)
(&self) -> [Vec](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/alloc/vec/struct.Vec.html "struct alloc::vec::Vec")
<[u8](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/std/primitive.u8.html)
\>

Returns the little endian byte representation of the element.

Provided Methods[](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/utils/trait.ScalarField.html#provided-methods)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/utils.rs.html#29-33)

#### fn [from\_bytes\_le](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/utils/trait.ScalarField.html#method.from_bytes_le)
(bytes: &\[[u8](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/std/primitive.u8.html)\
\]) -> Self

Creates a field element from a little endian byte representation.

The default implementation assumes that `PrimeField::from_repr` is implemented for little-endian. It should be overriden if this is not the case.

Implementors[](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/utils/trait.ScalarField.html#implementors)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/utils.rs.html#318-334)
[](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/utils/trait.ScalarField.html#impl-ScalarField-for-F)

### impl<F> [ScalarField](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/utils/trait.ScalarField.html "trait halo2_base::utils::ScalarField")
 for Fwhere  
    F: FieldExt + [Hash](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/hash/trait.Hash.html "trait core::hash::Hash")
,

We do a blanket implementation in ‘community-edition’ to make it easier to integrate with other crates.

ASSUMING F::Repr is little-endian

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_ecc/ecc/mod.rs.html#301-326)
 · [\[−\]](javascript:void(0) "collapse all docs")

    pub fn ec_double<F: PrimeField, FC: FieldChip<F>>(    chip: &FC,    ctx: &mut Context<F>,    P: impl Into<EcPoint<F, FC::FieldPoint>>) -> EcPoint<F, FC::FieldPoint>

Expand description

[Assumptions](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/ecc/fn.ec_double.html#assumptions)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   `P.y != 0`
*   `P` is not the point at infinity (undefined behavior otherwise)

<U> for Twhere  
    U: [From](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.From.html "trait core::convert::From")
<T>,

const: [unstable](https://github.com/rust-lang/rust/issues/88674 "Tracking issue for const_convert")
 · [source](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/src/core/convert/mod.rs.html#725)
[](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/fields/enum.FpStrategy.html#method.into)

#### fn [into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html#tymethod.into)
(self) -> U

Calls `U::from(self)`.

That is, this conversion is whatever the implementation of `[From](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.From.html "From") <T> for U` chooses to do.

    pub fn ec_double_and_add_unequal<F: PrimeField, FC: FieldChip<F>>(    chip: &FC,    ctx: &mut Context<F>,    P: impl Into<ComparableEcPoint<F, FC>>,    Q: impl Into<ComparableEcPoint<F, FC>>,    is_strict: bool) -> EcPoint<F, FC::FieldPoint>

Expand description

Implements: computing 2P + Q = P + Q + P for P = (x0, y0), Q = (x1, y1)

[Assumptions](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/ecc/fn.ec_double_and_add_unequal.html#assumptions)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   Neither `P` nor `Q` is the point at infinity (undefined behavior otherwise)

        type ReducedFieldPoint: Clone + Debug + Send + Sync;
        type FieldType: Field;
        type RangeChip: RangeInstructions<F>;
    
        const PRIME_FIELD_NUM_BITS: u32;

        fn neg_divide_unsafe(        &self,        ctx: &mut Context<F>,        a: impl Into<Self::UnsafeFieldPoint>,        b: impl Into<Self::UnsafeFieldPoint>    ) -> Self::FieldPoint { ... }
    }

Expand description

Trait for common functionality for finite field chips. Primarily intended to emulate a “non-native” finite field using “native” values in a prime field `F`. Most functions are designed for the case when the non-native field is larger than the native field, but the trait can still be implemented and used in other cases.

Required Associated Types[](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/fields/trait.FieldChip.html#required-associated-types)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

\>

A representation of a field element that is used for intermediate computations. The representation can have “overflows” (e.g., overflow limbs or negative limbs).

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_ecc/fields/mod.rs.html#39-44)

#### type [FieldPoint](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/fields/trait.FieldChip.html#associatedtype.FieldPoint)
: [Clone](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/clone/trait.Clone.html "trait core::clone::Clone")
 + [Debug](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/fmt/trait.Debug.html "trait core::fmt::Debug")
 + [Send](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/marker/trait.Send.html "trait core::marker::Send")

<Self::[ReducedFieldPoint](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/fields/trait.FieldChip.html#associatedtype.ReducedFieldPoint "type halo2_ecc::fields::FieldChip::ReducedFieldPoint")

<&'a Self::[FieldPoint](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/fields/trait.FieldChip.html#associatedtype.FieldPoint "type halo2_ecc::fields::FieldChip::FieldPoint")
\>

The “proper” representation of a field element. Allowed to be a non-unique representation of a field element (e.g., can be greater than modulus)

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_ecc/fields/mod.rs.html#47)

#### type [ReducedFieldPoint](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/fields/trait.FieldChip.html#associatedtype.ReducedFieldPoint)
: [Clone](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/clone/trait.Clone.html "trait core::clone::Clone")
 + [Debug](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/fmt/trait.Debug.html "trait core::fmt::Debug")
 + [Send](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/marker/trait.Send.html "trait core::marker::Send")
 + [Sync](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/marker/trait.Sync.html "trait core::marker::Sync")

A proper representation of field elements that guarantees a unique representation of each field element. Typically this means Uints that are less than the modulus.

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_ecc/fields/mod.rs.html#50)

#### type [FieldType](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/fields/trait.FieldChip.html#associatedtype.FieldType)
: Field

A type implementing `Field` trait to help with witness generation (for example with inverse)

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_ecc/fields/mod.rs.html#51)

<Self::[UnsafeFieldPoint](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/fields/trait.FieldChip.html#associatedtype.UnsafeFieldPoint "type halo2_ecc::fields::FieldChip::UnsafeFieldPoint")
\>,  
    b: impl [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<Self::[UnsafeFieldPoint](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/fields/trait.FieldChip.html#associatedtype.UnsafeFieldPoint "type halo2_ecc::fields::FieldChip::UnsafeFieldPoint")
\>  
) -> Self::[FieldPoint](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/fields/trait.FieldChip.html#associatedtype.FieldPoint "type halo2_ecc::fields::FieldChip::FieldPoint")

Returns `a / b` without constraining `b` to be nonzero.

Warning: undefined behavior when `b` is zero.

`a, b` must be such that `quot * b - a` without carry does not overflow, where `quot` is the output.

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_ecc/fields/mod.rs.html#248-259)

) -> Self::[FieldPoint](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/fields/trait.FieldChip.html#associatedtype.FieldPoint "type halo2_ecc::fields::FieldChip::FieldPoint")

Constrains that `b` is nonzero as a field element and then returns `-a / b`.

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_ecc/fields/mod.rs.html#263-284)

# ec_select_by_indicator in halo2_ecc::ecc - Rust

![Copy item path](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/clipboard.svg)


[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_ecc/bigint/big_is_equal.rs.html#11-29)
 · [\[−\]](javascript:void(0) "collapse all docs")

    pub fn assign<F: ScalarField>(    gate: &impl GateInstructions<F>,    ctx: &mut Context<F>,    a: impl Into<ProperUint<F>>,    b: impl Into<ProperUint<F>>) -> AssignedValue<F>

Expand description

Given [`ProperUint`](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/bigint/struct.ProperUint.html "ProperUint")
s `a` and `b` with the same number of limbs, returns whether `a == b`.

[Assumptions:](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/bigint/big_is_equal/fn.assign.html#assumptions)

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   `a, b` have the same number of limbs.
*   The number of limbs is nonzero.

---

::[ec\_sub\_strict](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/ecc/fn.ec_sub_strict.html#)
![Copy item path](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/clipboard.svg)


[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_ecc/ecc/mod.rs.html#252-284)
 · [\[−\]](javascript:void(0) "collapse all docs")

    pub fn ec_sub_strict<F: PrimeField, FC: FieldChip<F>>(    chip: &FC,    ctx: &mut Context<F>,    P: impl Into<EcPoint<F, FC::FieldPoint>>,    Q: impl Into<EcPoint<F, FC::FieldPoint>>) -> EcPoint<F, FC::FieldPoint>where    FC: Selectable<F, FC::FieldPoint>,

Expand description

Constrains `P != -Q` but allows `P == Q`, in which case output is (0,0). For Weierstrass curves only.

Assumptions

[Neither P or Q is the point at infinity](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/ecc/fn.ec_sub_strict.html#neither-p-or-q-is-the-point-at-infinity)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

---

# assign in halo2_ecc::bigint::big_is_zero - Rust

Function [halo2\_ecc](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/index.html)
::[bigint](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/bigint/index.html)
::[big\_is\_zero](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/bigint/big_is_zero/index.html)
::[assign](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/bigint/big_is_zero/fn.assign.html#)
![Copy item path](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/clipboard.svg)


[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_ecc/bigint/big_is_zero.rs.html#27-41)
 · [\[−\]](javascript:void(0) "collapse all docs")

    pub fn assign<F: ScalarField>(    gate: &impl GateInstructions<F>,    ctx: &mut Context<F>,    a: ProperUint<F>) -> AssignedValue<F>

Expand description

Given ProperUint `a`, returns 1 iff every limb of `a` is zero. Returns 0 otherwise.

It is almost always more efficient to use [`positive`](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/bigint/big_is_zero/fn.positive.html "positive")
 instead.

[Assumptions](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/bigint/big_is_zero/fn.assign.html#assumptions)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   `a` has nonzero number of limbs

---

    pub fn ec_sub_unequal<F: PrimeField, FC: FieldChip<F>>(    chip: &FC,    ctx: &mut Context<F>,    P: impl Into<ComparableEcPoint<F, FC>>,    Q: impl Into<ComparableEcPoint<F, FC>>,    is_strict: bool) -> EcPoint<F, FC::FieldPoint>

Expand description

If `is_strict = true`, then this function constrains that `P.x != Q.x`. If you are calling this with `is_strict = false`, you must ensure that `P.x != Q.x` by some external logic (such as a mathematical theorem).

[Assumptions](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/ecc/fn.ec_sub_unequal.html#assumptions)

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   Neither `P` nor `Q` is the point at infinity (undefined behavior otherwise)

# crt in halo2_ecc::bigint::big_is_zero - Rust

Function [halo2\_ecc](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/index.html)
::[bigint](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/bigint/index.html)
::[big\_is\_zero](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/bigint/big_is_zero/index.html)
::[crt](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/bigint/big_is_zero/fn.crt.html#)
![Copy item path](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/clipboard.svg)


[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_ecc/bigint/big_is_zero.rs.html#47-53)
 · [\[−\]](javascript:void(0) "collapse all docs")

    pub fn crt<F: ScalarField>(    gate: &impl GateInstructions<F>,    ctx: &mut Context<F>,    a: ProperCrtUint<F>) -> AssignedValue<F>

Expand description

Returns 0 or 1. Returns 1 iff the limbs of `a` are identically zero. This just calls [`assign`](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/bigint/big_is_zero/fn.assign.html "assign")
 on the limbs.

It is almost always more efficient to use [`positive`](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/bigint/big_is_zero/fn.positive.html "positive")
 instead.

---

![Copy item path](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/clipboard.svg)


[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_ecc/bigint/big_is_zero.rs.html#8-19)
 · [\[−\]](javascript:void(0) "collapse all docs")

    pub fn positive<F: ScalarField>(    gate: &impl GateInstructions<F>,    ctx: &mut Context<F>,    a: OverflowInteger<F>) -> AssignedValue<F>

Expand description

[Assumptions](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/bigint/big_is_zero/fn.positive.html#assumptions)

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   `a` has nonzero number of limbs
*   The limbs of `a` are all in \[0, 2a.max\_limb\_bits)\
*   a.limbs.len() \* 2a.max\_limb\_bits `is less than modulus of`F\`

<F>>,

Constrains and returns the inner product of `<a, b>`.

Assumes ‘a’ and ‘b’ are the same length.

*   `ctx`: [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "Context")
     to add the constraints to
*   `a`: Iterator of [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
     values
*   `b`: Iterator of [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
     values to take inner product of `a` by

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate.rs.html#338-345)

#### fn [inner\_product\_left\_last](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#tymethod.inner_product_left_last)
<QA>(  
    &self,

<F>)where

<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>,

Returns the inner product of `<a, b>` and the last element of `a` now assigned, i.e. `(inner_product_<a, b>, last_element_a)`.

Assumes ‘a’ and ‘b’ are the same length.

*   `ctx`: [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "Context")
     of the circuit
*   `a`: Iterator of [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
    s
*   `b`: Iterator of [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
    s to take inner product of `a` by

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate.rs.html#355-362)

#### fn [inner\_product\_with\_sums](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#tymethod.inner_product_with_sums)
<'thread, QA>(  
    &self,  
    ctx: &'thread mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")
<F>,  
    a: impl [IntoIterator](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/iter/traits/collect/trait.IntoIterator.html "trait core::iter::traits::collect::IntoIterator")
<Item = QA>,  
    b: impl [IntoIterator](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/iter/traits/collect/trait.IntoIterator.html "trait core::iter::traits::collect::IntoIterator")
<Item = [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>  
) -> [Box](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/alloc/boxed/struct.Box.html "struct alloc::boxed::Box")
<dyn [Iterator](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/iter/traits/iterator/trait.Iterator.html "trait core::iter::traits::iterator::Iterator")
<Item = [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>> + 'thread>where  
    QA: [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>,

Calculates and constrains the inner product.

Returns the assignment trace where `output[i]` has the running sum `sum_{j=0..=i} a[j] * b[j]`.

Assumes ‘a’ and ‘b’ are the same length.

*   `ctx`: [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "Context")
     to add the constraints to
*   `a`: Iterator of [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
     values
*   `b`: Iterator of [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
     values to calculate the partial sums of the inner product of `a` by.

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate.rs.html#467-472)

#### fn [sum\_products\_with\_coeff\_and\_var](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#tymethod.sum_products_with_coeff_and_var)
(  
    &self,  
    ctx: &mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")
<F>,  
    values: impl [IntoIterator](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/iter/traits/collect/trait.IntoIterator.html "trait core::iter::traits::collect::IntoIterator")
<Item = (F, [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>, [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>)>,  
    var: [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>  
) -> [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>

Constrains and returns the sum of products of `coeff * (a * b)` defined in `values` plus a variable `var` e.g. `x = var + values[0].0 * (values[0].1 * values[0].2) + values[1].0 * (values[1].1 * values[1].2) + ... + values[n].0 * (values[n].1 * values[n].2)`.

*   `ctx`: [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "Context")
     to add the constraints to.
*   `values`: Iterator of tuples `(coeff, a, b)` where `coeff` is a field element, `a` and `b` are [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
    ’s.
*   `var`: [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
     that represents the value of a variable added to the sum.

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate.rs.html#565-571)

#### fn [select](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#tymethod.select)
(  
    &self,  
    ctx: &mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")
<F>,  
    a: impl [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>,  
    b: impl [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>,  
    sel: impl [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>  
) -> [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>

Constrains and returns `sel ? a : b` assuming `sel` is boolean.

Defines a vertical gate of form `| 1 - sel | sel | 1 | a | 1 - sel | sel | 1 | b | out |`, where out = sel \* a + (1 - sel) \* b.

*   `ctx`: [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "Context")
     to add the constraints to.
*   `a`: [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
     that contains a boolean value.
*   `b`: [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
     that contains a boolean value.
*   `sel`: [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
     that contains a boolean value.

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate.rs.html#580-586)

#### fn [or\_and](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#tymethod.or_and)
(  
    &self,  
    ctx: &mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")
<F>,  
    a: impl [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>,  
    b: impl [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>,  
    c: impl [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>  
) -> [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>

Constains and returns `a || (b && c)`, assuming `a`, `b` and `c` are boolean.

Defines a vertical gate of form `| 1 - b c | b | c | 1 | a - 1 | 1 - b c | out | a - 1 | 1 | 1 | a |`, where out = a + b \* c - a \* b \* c.

*   `ctx`: [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "Context")
     to add the constraints to.
*   `a`: [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
     that contains a boolean value.
*   `b`: [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
     that contains a boolean value.
*   `c`: [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
     that contains a boolean value.

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate.rs.html#787-792)

#### fn [num\_to\_bits](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#tymethod.num_to_bits)
(  
    &self,  
    ctx: &mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")
<F>,  
    a: [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>,  
    range\_bits: [usize](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/std/primitive.usize.html)
  
) -> [Vec](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/alloc/vec/struct.Vec.html "struct alloc::vec::Vec")
<[AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>>

Constrains and returns little-endian bit vector representation of `a`.

Assumes `range_bits <= number of bits in a`.

*   `a`: [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
     of the value to convert
*   `range_bits`: range of bits needed to represent `a`

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate.rs.html#851-855)

#### fn [const\_right\_rotate\_unsafe](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#tymethod.const_right_rotate_unsafe)
<const BIT: [usize](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/std/primitive.usize.html)
, const NUM\_BITS: [usize](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/std/primitive.usize.html)
\>(  
    &self,  
    ctx: &mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")
<F>,  
    a: [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>  
) -> [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>

Bitwise right rotate a by BIT bits. BIT and NUM\_BITS must be determined at compile time.

Assumes ‘a’ is a NUM\_BITS bit integer and NUM\_BITS <= 128.

*   `ctx`: [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "Context")
     to add the constraints to
*   `a`: a [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "AssignedValue")
     value.

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate.rs.html#862-866)

#### fn [const\_left\_rotate\_unsafe](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#tymethod.const_left_rotate_unsafe)
<const BIT: [usize](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/std/primitive.usize.html)
, const NUM\_BITS: [usize](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/std/primitive.usize.html)
\>(  
    &self,  
    ctx: &mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")
<F>,  
    a: [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>  
) -> [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>

Bitwise left rotate a by BIT bits. BIT and NUM\_BITS must be determined at compile time.

Assumes ‘a’ is a NUM\_BITS bit integer and NUM\_BITS <= 128.

*   `ctx`: [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "Context")
     to add the constraints to
*   `a`: a [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "AssignedValue")
     value.

Provided Methods[](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#provided-methods)

#### fn [add](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.add)
(  
    &self,  
    ctx: &mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")
<F>,  
    a: impl [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>,  
    b: impl [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>  
) -> [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>

Constrains and returns `a + b * 1 = out`.

Defines a vertical gate of form | a | b | 1 | a + b | where (a + b) = out.

*   `ctx`: [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "Context")
     to add the constraints to
*   `a`: [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
     value
*   `b`: [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
     value to add to ’a\`

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate.rs.html#191-203)

#### fn [sub](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.sub)
(  
    &self,  
    ctx: &mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")
<F>,  
    a: impl [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>,  
    b: impl [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>  
) -> [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>

Constrains and returns `a + b * (-1) = out`.

Defines a vertical gate of form | a - b | b | 1 | a |, where (a - b) = out.

*   `ctx`: [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "Context")
     to add the constraints to
*   `a`: [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
     value
*   `b`: [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
     value to subtract from ‘a’

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate.rs.html#210-215)

#### fn [neg](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.neg)
(  
    &self,  
    ctx: &mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")
<F>,  
    a: impl [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>  
) -> [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>

Constrains and returns `a * (-1) = out`.

Defines a vertical gate of form | a | -a | 1 | 0 |, where (-a) = out.

*   `ctx`: the [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "Context")
     to add the constraints to
*   `a`: [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
     value to negate

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate.rs.html#223-233)

#### fn [mul](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.mul)
(  
    &self,  
    ctx: &mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")
<F>,

<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>,

<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>  
) -> [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>

Constrains and returns `0 + a * b = out`.

Defines a vertical gate of form | 0 | a | b | a \* b |, where (a \* b) = out.

*   `ctx`: [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "Context")
     to add the constraints to
*   `a`: [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
     value
*   `b`: [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
     value to multiply ‘a’ by

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate.rs.html#242-254)

#### fn [mul\_add](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.mul_add)
(  
    &self,  
    ctx: &mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")
<F>,  
    a: impl [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>,  
    b: impl [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>,  
    c: impl [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>  
) -> [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>

Constrains and returns `a * b + c = out`.

Defines a vertical gate of form | c | a | b | a \* b + c |, where (a \* b + c) = out.

*   `ctx`: [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "Context")
     to add the constraints to
*   `a`: [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
     value
*   `b`: [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
     value to multiply ‘a’ by
*   `c`: [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
     value to add to ‘a \* b’

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate.rs.html#262-273)

#### fn [mul\_not](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.mul_not)
(  
    &self,  
    ctx: &mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")
<F>,  
    a: impl [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>,  
    b: impl [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>  
) -> [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>

Constrains and returns `(1 - a) * b = b - a * b`.

Defines a vertical gate of form | (1 - a) \* b | a | b | b |, where (1 - a) \* b = out.

*   `ctx`: [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "Context")
     to add the constraints to
*   `a`: [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
     value
*   `b`: [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
     value to multiply ‘a’ by

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate.rs.html#280-282)

#### fn [assert\_bit](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.assert_bit)
(&self, ctx: &mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")
<F>, x: [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>)

Constrains that x is boolean (e.g. 0 or 1).

Defines a vertical gate of form | 0 | x | x | x |.

*   `ctx`: [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "Context")
     to add the constraints to
*   `x`: [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
     value to constrain

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate.rs.html#292-305)

#### fn [div\_unsafe](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.div_unsafe)
(  
    &self,  
    ctx: &mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")
<F>,  
    a: impl [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>,  
    b: impl [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>  
) -> [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>

Constrains and returns a / b = 0.

Defines a vertical gate of form | 0 | b^1 \* a | b | a |, where b^1 \* a = out.

Assumes `b != 0`.

*   `ctx`: [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "Context")
     to add the constraints to
*   `a`: [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
     value
*   `b`: [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
     value to divide ‘a’ by

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate.rs.html#311-315)

(&self, ctx: &mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")

<F>, constant: [&](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/std/primitive.reference.html)
F)

Constrains that `a` is equal to `constant` value.

     to add the constraints to
*   `a`: [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
     value
*   `constant`: constant value to constrain `a` to be equal to

) -> [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")

<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>,

Constrains and returns the sum of [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
’s in iterator `a`.

*   `ctx`: [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "Context")
     to add the constraints to
*   `a`: Iterator of [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
     values to sum

#### fn [partial\_sums](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.partial_sums)
<'thread, Q>(  
    &self,  
    ctx: &'thread mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")
<F>,  
    a: impl [IntoIterator](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/iter/traits/collect/trait.IntoIterator.html "trait core::iter::traits::collect::IntoIterator")
<Item = Q>  
) -> [Box](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/alloc/boxed/struct.Box.html "struct alloc::boxed::Box")
<dyn [Iterator](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/iter/traits/iterator/trait.Iterator.html "trait core::iter::traits::iterator::Iterator")
<Item = [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>> + 'thread>where  
    Q: [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>,

Calculates and constrains the sum of the elements of `a`.

Returns the assignment trace where `output[i]` has the running sum `sum_{j=0..=i} a[j]`.

*   `ctx`: [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "Context")
     to add the constraints to
*   `a`: Iterator of [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
     values to sum

#### fn [accumulated\_product](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.accumulated_product)
<QA, QB>(  
    &self,  
    ctx: &mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")
<F>,  
    a: impl [IntoIterator](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/iter/traits/collect/trait.IntoIterator.html "trait core::iter::traits::collect::IntoIterator")
<Item = QA>,  
    b: impl [IntoIterator](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/iter/traits/collect/trait.IntoIterator.html "trait core::iter::traits::collect::IntoIterator")
<Item = QB>  
) -> [Vec](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/alloc/vec/struct.Vec.html "struct alloc::vec::Vec")
<[AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>>where  
    QA: [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>,  
    QB: [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>,

Calculates and constrains the accumulated product of ‘a’ and ‘b’ i.e. `x_i = b_1 * (a_1...a_{i - 1}) + b_2 * (a_2...a_{i - 1}) + ... + b_i`

Returns the assignment trace where `output[i]` is the running accumulated product x\_i.

Assumes ‘a’ and ‘b’ are the same length.

*   `ctx`: [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "Context")
     to add the constraints to
*   `a`: Iterator of [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
     values
*   `b`: Iterator of [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
     values to take the accumulated product of `a` by

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate.rs.html#480-502)

#### fn [or](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.or)
(  
    &self,  
    ctx: &mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")
<F>,  
    a: impl [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>,  
    b: impl [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>  
) -> [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>

Constrains and returns `a || b`, assuming `a` and `b` are boolean.

Defines a vertical gate of form `| 1 - b | 1 | b | 1 | b | a | 1 - b | out |`, where `out = a + b - a * b`.

*   `ctx`: [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "Context")
     to add the constraints to.
*   `a`: [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
     that contains a boolean value.
*   `b`: [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
     that contains a boolean value.

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate.rs.html#510-517)

#### fn [and](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.and)
(  
    &self,  
    ctx: &mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")
<F>,  
    a: impl [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>,  
    b: impl [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>  
) -> [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>

Constrains and returns `a & b`, assumeing `a` and `b` are boolean.

Defines a vertical gate of form | 0 | a | b | out |, where out = a \* b.

*   `ctx`: [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "Context")
     to add the constraints to.
*   `a`: [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
     that contains a boolean value.
*   `b`: [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
     that contains a boolean value.

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate.rs.html#525-547)

#### fn [xor](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.xor)
(  
    &self,  
    ctx: &mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")
<F>,  
    a: impl [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>,  
    b: impl [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>  
) -> [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>

Constrains and returns `a ^ b`, assuming `a` and `b` are boolean.

Defines a vertical gate of form `| 1 - 2 * b | 2 | b | 1 | b | a | 1 - 2 * b | out |`, where `out = a + b - 2 * a * b`.

*   `ctx`: [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "Context")
     to add the constraints to.
*   `a`: [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
     that contains a boolean value.
*   `b`: [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
     that contains a boolean value.

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate.rs.html#554-556)

#### fn [not](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.not)
(  
    &self,  
    ctx: &mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")
<F>,  
    a: impl [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>  
) -> [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>

Constrains and returns `!a` assumeing `a` is boolean.

Defines a vertical gate of form | 1 - a | a | 1 | 1 |, where 1 - a = out.

*   `ctx`: [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "Context")
     to add the constraints to.
*   `a`: [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
     that contains a boolean value.

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate.rs.html#594-641)

#### fn [bits\_to\_indicator](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.bits_to_indicator)
(  
    &self,  
    ctx: &mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")
<F>,  
    bits: &\[[AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")\
<F>\]  
) -> [Vec](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/alloc/vec/struct.Vec.html "struct alloc::vec::Vec")
<[AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>>

Constrains and returns an indicator vector from a slice of boolean values, where `output[idx] = 1` iff idx = (the number represented by `bits` in binary little endian), otherwise `output[idx] = 0`.

*   `ctx`: [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "Context")
     to add the constraints to
*   `bits`: slice of [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
    ’s that contains boolean values

##### [Assumptions](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#assumptions)

*   `bits` is non-empty

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate.rs.html#649-685)

#### fn [idx\_to\_indicator](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.idx_to_indicator)
(  
    &self,  
    ctx: &mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")
<F>,  
    idx: impl [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>,  
    len: [usize](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/std/primitive.usize.html)
  
) -> [Vec](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/alloc/vec/struct.Vec.html "struct alloc::vec::Vec")
<[AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>>

Constrains and returns a [Vec](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/alloc/vec/struct.Vec.html "Vec")
 `indicator` of length `len`, where `indicator[i] == 1 if i == idx otherwise 0`, if `idx >= len` then `indicator` is all zeros.

Assumes `len` is greater than 0.

*   `ctx`: [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "Context")
     to add the constraints to
*   `idx`: [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
     index of the indicator vector to be set to 1
*   `len`: length of the `indicator` vector

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate.rs.html#694-716)

#### fn [select\_by\_indicator](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.select_by_indicator)
<Q>(  
    &self,  
    ctx: &mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")
<F>,  
    a: impl [IntoIterator](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/iter/traits/collect/trait.IntoIterator.html "trait core::iter::traits::collect::IntoIterator")
<Item = Q>,  
    indicator: impl [IntoIterator](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/iter/traits/collect/trait.IntoIterator.html "trait core::iter::traits::collect::IntoIterator")
<Item = [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>>  
) -> [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>where  
    Q: [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>,

Constrains the inner product of `a` and `indicator` and returns `a[idx]` (e.g. the value of `a` at `idx`).

Assumes that `a` and `indicator` are non-empty iterators of the same length, the values of `indicator` are boolean, and that `indicator` has at most one `1` bit.

*   `ctx`: [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "Context")
     to add the constraints to
*   `a`: Iterator of [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
    ’s that contains field elements
*   `indicator`: Iterator of [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "AssignedValue")
    ’s where indicator\[i\] == 1 if i == `idx`, otherwise 0

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate.rs.html#724-739)

#### fn [select\_from\_idx](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.select_from_idx)
<Q>(  
    &self,  
    ctx: &mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")
<F>,  
    cells: impl [IntoIterator](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/iter/traits/collect/trait.IntoIterator.html "trait core::iter::traits::collect::IntoIterator")
<Item = Q>,  
    idx: impl [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>  
) -> [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>where  
    Q: [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>,

Constrains and returns `cells[idx]` if `idx < cells.len()`, otherwise return 0.

Assumes that `cells` and `idx` are non-empty iterators of the same length.

*   `ctx`: [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "Context")
     to add the constraints to
*   `cells`: Iterator of [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
    s to select from
*   `idx`: [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
     with value `idx` where `idx` is the index of the cell to be selected

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate.rs.html#746-766)

#### fn [is\_zero](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.is_zero)
(&self, ctx: &mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")
<F>, a: [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>) -> [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>

Constrains that a cell is equal to 0 and returns `1` if `a = 0`, otherwise `0`.

Defines a vertical gate of form `| out | a | inv | 1 | 0 | a | out | 0 |`, where out = 1 if a = 0, otherwise out = 0.

*   `ctx`: [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "Context")
     to add the constraints to
*   `a`: [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
     value to be constrained

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate.rs.html#772-780)

#### fn [is\_equal](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.is_equal)
(  
    &self,  
    ctx: &mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")
<F>,  
    a: impl [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>,  
    b: impl [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>  
) -> [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>

Constrains that the value of two cells are equal: b - a = 0, returns `1` if `a = b`, otherwise `0`.

*   `ctx`: [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "Context")
     to add the constraints to
*   `a`: [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
     value
*   `b`: [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
     value to compare to `a`

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate.rs.html#806-844)

#### fn [lagrange\_and\_eval](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.lagrange_and_eval)
(  
    &self,  
    ctx: &mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")
<F>,  
    coords: &\[([AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")\
<F>, [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")\
<F>)\],  
    x: [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>  
) -> ([AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>, [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>)

Performs and constrains Lagrange interpolation on `coords` and evaluates the resulting polynomial at `x`.

Given pairs `coords[i] = (x_i, y_i)`, let `f` be the unique degree `len(coords) - 1` polynomial such that `f(x_i) = y_i` for all `i`.

Returns: (f(x), Prod\_i(x - x\_i))

*   `ctx`: [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "Context")
     to add the constraints to
*   `coords`: immutable reference to a slice of tuples of [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "AssignedValue")
    s representing the points to interpolate over such that `coords[i] = (x_i, y_i)`
*   `x`: x-coordinate of the point to evaluate `f` at

##### [Assumptions](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#assumptions-1)

*   `coords` is non-empty

Implementors[](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#implementors)

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate.rs.html#973-1237)
[](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#impl-GateInstructions%3CF%3E-for-GateChip%3CF%3E)

### impl<F: [ScalarField](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/utils/trait.ScalarField.html "trait halo2_base::utils::ScalarField")
\> [GateInstructions](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html "trait halo2_base::gates::flex_gate::GateInstructions")
<F> for [GateChip](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/struct.GateChip.html "struct halo2_base::gates::flex_gate::GateChip")
<F>

 · [\[−\]](javascript:void(0) "collapse all docs")

    pub fn crt<F: BigPrimeField>(    range: &impl RangeInstructions<F>,    ctx: &mut Context<F>,    a: CRTInteger<F>,    k_bits: usize,    modulus: &BigInt,    mod_vec: &[F],    mod_native: F,    limb_bits: usize,    limb_bases: &[F],    limb_base_big: &BigInt) -> ProperCrtUint<F>

Expand description

[Assumptions](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/bigint/carry_mod/fn.crt.html#assumptions)

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   abs(a) <= 2n \* k - 1 + F::NUM\_BITS - 2 (A weaker assumption is also enough, but this is good enough for forseeable use cases)
*   `native_modulus::<F>` requires _exactly_ `k = a.limbs.len()` limbs to represent

# multi_scalar_multiply in halo2_ecc::ecc - Rust

Function [halo2\_ecc](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/index.html)
::[ecc](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/ecc/index.html)
::[multi\_scalar\_multiply](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/ecc/fn.multi_scalar_multiply.html#)
![Copy item path](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/clipboard.svg)


[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_ecc/ecc/mod.rs.html#650-761)
 · [\[−\]](javascript:void(0) "collapse all docs")

    pub fn multi_scalar_multiply<F: PrimeField, FC, C>(    chip: &FC,    ctx: &mut Context<F>,    P: &[EcPoint<F, FC::FieldPoint>],    scalars: Vec<Vec<AssignedValue<F>>>,    max_bits: usize,    window_bits: usize) -> EcPoint<F, FC::FieldPoint>where    FC: FieldChip<F> + Selectable<F, FC::FieldPoint>,    C: CurveAffineExt<Base = FC::FieldType>,

Expand description

[Assumptions](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/ecc/fn.multi_scalar_multiply.html#assumptions)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   `points.len() == scalars.len()`
*   `scalars[i].len() == scalars[j].len()` for all `i, j`
*   `scalars[i]` is less than the order of `P`
*   `scalars[i][j] < 2^{max_bits} for all j`
*   `max_bits <= modulus::<F>.bits()`, and equality only allowed when the order of `P` equals the modulus of `F`
*   `points` are all on the curve or the point at infinity
*   `points[i]` is allowed to be (0, 0) to represent the point at infinity (identity point)
*   Currently implementation assumes that the only point on curve with y-coordinate equal to `0` is identity point

---

# scalar_multiply in halo2_ecc::ecc - Rust

Function [halo2\_ecc](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/index.html)
::[ecc](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/ecc/index.html)
::[scalar\_multiply](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/ecc/fn.scalar_multiply.html#)
![Copy item path](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/clipboard.svg)


[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_ecc/ecc/mod.rs.html#487-585)
 · [\[−\]](javascript:void(0) "collapse all docs")

    pub fn scalar_multiply<F: PrimeField, FC, C>(    chip: &FC,    ctx: &mut Context<F>,    P: EcPoint<F, FC::FieldPoint>,    scalar: Vec<AssignedValue<F>>,    max_bits: usize,    window_bits: usize) -> EcPoint<F, FC::FieldPoint>where    FC: FieldChip<F> + Selectable<F, FC::FieldPoint>,    C: CurveAffineExt<Base = FC::FieldType>,

Expand description

Computes `[scalar] * P` on short Weierstrass curve `y^2 = x^3 + b`

*   `scalar` is represented as a reference array of `AssignedValue`s
*   `scalar = sum_i scalar_i * 2^{max_bits * i}`
*   an array of length > 1 is needed when `scalar` exceeds the modulus of scalar field `F`

[Assumptions](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/ecc/fn.scalar_multiply.html#assumptions)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   `window_bits != 0`
*   The order of `P` is at least `2^{window_bits}` (in particular, `P` is not the point at infinity)
*   The curve has no points of order 2.
*   `scalar_i < 2^{max_bits} for all i`
*   `max_bits <= modulus::<F>.bits()`, and equality only allowed when the order of `P` equals the modulus of `F`

---

# truncate in halo2_ecc::bigint::mul_no_carry - Rust

Function [halo2\_ecc](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/index.html)
::[bigint](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/bigint/index.html)
::[mul\_no\_carry](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/bigint/mul_no_carry/index.html)
::[truncate](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/bigint/mul_no_carry/fn.truncate.html#)
![Copy item path](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/clipboard.svg)


[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_ecc/bigint/mul_no_carry.rs.html#9-35)
 · [\[−\]](javascript:void(0) "collapse all docs")

    pub fn truncate<F: ScalarField>(    gate: &impl GateInstructions<F>,    ctx: &mut Context<F>,    a: OverflowInteger<F>,    b: OverflowInteger<F>,    num_limbs_log2_ceil: usize) -> OverflowInteger<F>

Expand description

[Assumptions](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/bigint/mul_no_carry/fn.truncate.html#assumptions)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   `a` and `b` have the same number of limbs `k`
*   `k` is nonzero
*   `num_limbs_log2_ceil = log2_ceil(k)`
*   `log2_ceil(k) + a.max_limb_bits + b.max_limb_bits <= F::NUM_BITS as usize - 2`

---

    pub fn assign<F: ScalarField>(    range: &impl RangeInstructions<F>,    ctx: &mut Context<F>,    a: impl Into<ProperUint<F>>,    b: impl Into<ProperUint<F>>,    limb_bits: usize,    limb_base: F) -> (OverflowInteger<F>, AssignedValue<F>)

Expand description

[Assumptions](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_ecc/bigint/sub/fn.assign.html#assumptions)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   Should only be called on integers a, b in proper representation with all limbs having at most `limb_bits` number of bits
*   `a, b` have same nonzero number of limbs
