[](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/range/struct.RangeConfig.html#impl-RangeConfig%3CF%3E)

### impl<F: [ScalarField](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/utils/trait.ScalarField.html "trait halo2_base::utils::ScalarField")
\> [RangeConfig](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/range/struct.RangeConfig.html "struct halo2_base::gates::range::RangeConfig")
<F>

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/gates/range.rs.html#74-133)

#### pub fn [configure](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/range/struct.RangeConfig.html#method.configure)
(  
    meta: &mut ConstraintSystem<F>,  
    range\_strategy: [RangeStrategy](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/range/enum.RangeStrategy.html "enum halo2_base::gates::range::RangeStrategy")
,  
    num\_advice: &\[[usize](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/std/primitive.usize.html)\
\],  
    num\_lookup\_advice: &\[[usize](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/std/primitive.usize.html)\
\],  
    num\_fixed: [usize](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/std/primitive.usize.html)
,  
    lookup\_bits: [usize](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/std/primitive.usize.html)
,  
    circuit\_degree: [usize](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/std/primitive.usize.html)
  
) -> Self

Generates a new [RangeConfig](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/range/struct.RangeConfig.html "RangeConfig")
 with the specified parameters.

If `num_columns` is 0, then we assume you do not want to perform any lookups in that phase.

Panics if `lookup_bits` > 28.

*   `meta`: \[ConstraintSystem\] of the circuit
*   `range_strategy`: [GateStrategy](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/enum.GateStrategy.html "GateStrategy")
     of the range chip
*   `num_advice`: Number of \[Advice\] \[Column\]s without lookup enabled in each phase
*   `num_lookup_advice`: Number of `lookup_advice` \[Column\]s in each phase
*   `num_fixed`: Number of fixed \[Column\]s in each phase
*   `lookup_bits`: Number of bits represented in the LookUp table \[0,2^lookup\_bits)\
*   `circuit_degree`: Degree that expresses the size of circuit (i.e., 2^circuit\_degree is the number of rows in the circuit)\
\
[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/gates/range.rs.html#136-138)\
\
#### pub fn [lookup\_bits](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/range/struct.RangeConfig.html#method.lookup_bits)\
(&self) -> [usize](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/std/primitive.usize.html)\
\
Returns the number of bits represented in the lookup table \[0,2^lookup\_bits).\
\
[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/gates/range.rs.html#165-181)\
\
#### pub fn [load\_lookup\_table](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/range/struct.RangeConfig.html#method.load_lookup_table)\
(  \
    &self,  \
    layouter: &mut impl Layouter<F>  \
) -> [Result](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/result/enum.Result.html "enum core::result::Result")\
<[()](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/std/primitive.unit.html)\
, Error>\
\
Loads the lookup table into the circuit using the provided `layouter`.\
\
*   `layouter`: layouter for the circuit\
\

#### fn [in\_current\_span](https://docs.rs/tracing/0.1.37/tracing/instrument/trait.Instrument.html#method.in_current_span)\
(self) -> [Instrumented](https://docs.rs/tracing/0.1.37/tracing/instrument/struct.Instrumented.html "struct tracing::instrument::Instrumented")\
<Self>\
\
Instruments this type with the [current](https://docs.rs/tracing/0.1.37/tracing/span/struct.Span.html#method.current)\
 [`Span`](https://docs.rs/tracing/0.1.37/tracing/span/struct.Span.html)\
, returning an `Instrumented` wrapper. [Read more](https://docs.rs/tracing/0.1.37/tracing/instrument/trait.Instrument.html#method.in_current_span)\
\
[source](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/src/core/convert/mod.rs.html#717)\

\
### impl<T, U> [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")\
<U> for Twhere  \
    U: [From](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.From.html "trait core::convert::From")\
<T>,\
\
const: [unstable](https://github.com/rust-lang/rust/issues/88674 "Tracking issue for const_convert")\
 · [source](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/src/core/convert/mod.rs.html#725)\
[](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/range/struct.RangeConfig.html#method.into)\
\
#### fn [into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html#tymethod.into)\
(self) -> U\
\
Calls `U::from(self)`.\
\
That is, this conversion is whatever the implementation of `[From](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.From.html "From") <T> for U` chooses to do.\
\

    pub struct GateChip<F: ScalarField> {
        pub pow_of_two: Vec<F>,
        pub field_element_cache: Vec<F>,
        /* private fields */
    }

Expand description

A chip that implements the [GateInstructions](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html "GateInstructions")
 trait supporting basic arithmetic operations.

Fields[](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/struct.GateChip.html#fields)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/struct.GateChip.html#structfield.pow_of_two)
`pow_of_two: [Vec](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/alloc/vec/struct.Vec.html "struct alloc::vec::Vec") <F>`

The field elements 2^i for i in 0..F::NUM\_BITS.

[](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/struct.GateChip.html#structfield.field_element_cache)
`field_element_cache: [Vec](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/alloc/vec/struct.Vec.html "struct alloc::vec::Vec") <F>`

To avoid Montgomery conversion in `F::from` for common small numbers, we keep a cache of field elements.

#### fn [get\_field\_element](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#tymethod.get_field_element)
(&self, n: [u64](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/std/primitive.u64.html)
) -> F

Returns the the value of `n` as a [ScalarField](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/utils/trait.ScalarField.html "ScalarField")
 element.

*   `n`: the [u64](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/std/primitive.u64.html "u64")
     value to convert

Assumes ‘a’ and ‘b’ are the same length.

*   `ctx`: [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "Context")

     values
*   `b`: Iterator of [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
     values to take inner product of `a` by

<QA>(  
    &self,  
    ctx: &mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")

<Item = QA>,

<Item = [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")

) -> ([AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")

<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>,

Returns the inner product of `<a, b>` and returns a tuple of the last item of `a` after it is assigned and the item to its left `(left_a, last_a)`.

Assumes ‘a’ and ‘b’ are the same length.

*   `ctx`: [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "Context")
     of the circuit
*   `a`: Iterator of [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
    s
*   `b`: Iterator of [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
    s to take inner product of `a` by

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate.rs.html#1054-1071)
[](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/struct.GateChip.html#method.inner_product_with_sums)

#### fn [inner\_product\_with\_sums](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#tymethod.inner_product_with_sums)
<'thread, QA>(  
    &self,  
    ctx: &'thread mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")
<F>,  
    a: impl [IntoIterator](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/iter/traits/collect/trait.IntoIterator.html "trait core::iter::traits::collect::IntoIterator")
<Item = QA>,  
    b: impl [IntoIterator](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/iter/traits/collect/trait.IntoIterator.html "trait core::iter::traits::collect::IntoIterator")
<Item = [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>  
) -> [Box](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/alloc/boxed/struct.Box.html "struct alloc::boxed::Box")
<dyn [Iterator](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/iter/traits/iterator/trait.Iterator.html "trait core::iter::traits::iterator::Iterator")
<Item = [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>> + 'thread>where  
    QA: [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>,

Calculates and constrains the inner product.

Returns the assignment trace where `output[i]` has the running sum `sum_{j=0..=i} a[j] * b[j]`.

Assumes ‘a’ and ‘b’ are the same length.

*   `ctx`: [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "Context")
     to add the constraints to
*   `a`: Iterator of [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
     values
*   `b`: Iterator of [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
     values to calculate the partial sums of the inner product of `a` by

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate.rs.html#1078-1103)
[](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/struct.GateChip.html#method.sum_products_with_coeff_and_var)

#### fn [sum\_products\_with\_coeff\_and\_var](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#tymethod.sum_products_with_coeff_and_var)
(  
    &self,  
    ctx: &mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")
<F>,  
    values: impl [IntoIterator](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/iter/traits/collect/trait.IntoIterator.html "trait core::iter::traits::collect::IntoIterator")
<Item = (F, [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>, [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>)>,  
    var: [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>  
) -> [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>

Constrains and returns the sum of products of `coeff * (a * b)` defined in `values` plus a variable `var` e.g. `x = var + values[0].0 * (values[0].1 * values[0].2) + values[1].0 * (values[1].1 * values[1].2) + ... + values[n].0 * (values[n].1 * values[n].2)`.

*   `ctx`: [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "Context")
     to add the constraints to
*   `values`: Iterator of tuples `(coeff, a, b)` where `coeff` is a field element, `a` and `b` are [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
    ’s
*   `var`: [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
     that represents the value of a variable added to the sum

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate.rs.html#1112-1142)
[](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/struct.GateChip.html#method.select)

#### fn [select](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#tymethod.select)
(  
    &self,  
    ctx: &mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")
<F>,  
    a: impl [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>,  
    b: impl [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>,  
    sel: impl [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>  
) -> [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>

Constrains and returns `sel ? a : b` assuming `sel` is boolean.

Defines a vertical gate of form `| 1 - sel | sel | 1 | a | 1 - sel | sel | 1 | b | out |`, where out = sel \* a + (1 - sel) \* b.

*   `ctx`: [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "Context")
     to add the constraints to
*   `a`: [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
     that contains a boolean value
*   `b`: [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
     that contains a boolean value
*   `sel`: [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
     that contains a boolean value

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate.rs.html#1151-1180)
[](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/struct.GateChip.html#method.or_and)

#### fn [or\_and](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#tymethod.or_and)
(  
    &self,  
    ctx: &mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")
<F>,  
    a: impl [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>,  
    b: impl [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>,  
    c: impl [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>  
) -> [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>

Constains and returns `a || (b && c)`, assuming `a`, `b` and `c` are boolean.

Defines a vertical gate of form `| 1 - b c | b | c | 1 | a - 1 | 1 - b c | out | a - 1 | 1 | 1 | a |`, where out = a + b \* c - a \* b \* c.

*   `ctx`: [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "Context")
     to add the constraints to
*   `a`: [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
     that contains a boolean value
*   `b`: [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
     that contains a boolean value
*   `c`: [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
     that contains a boolean value

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate.rs.html#1187-1213)
[](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/struct.GateChip.html#method.num_to_bits)

#### fn [num\_to\_bits](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#tymethod.num_to_bits)
(  
    &self,  
    ctx: &mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")
<F>,  
    a: [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>,  
    range\_bits: [usize](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/std/primitive.usize.html)
  
) -> [Vec](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/alloc/vec/struct.Vec.html "struct alloc::vec::Vec")
<[AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>>

Constrains and returns little-endian bit vector representation of `a`.

Assumes `range_bits >= number of bits in a`.

*   `a`: [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
     of the value to convert
*   `range_bits`: range of bits needed to represent `a`. Assumes `range_bits > 0`.

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate.rs.html#1215-1224)
[](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/struct.GateChip.html#method.const_right_rotate_unsafe)

#### fn [const\_right\_rotate\_unsafe](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#tymethod.const_right_rotate_unsafe)
<const BIT: [usize](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/std/primitive.usize.html)
, const NUM\_BITS: [usize](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/std/primitive.usize.html)
\>(  
    &self,  
    ctx: &mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")
<F>,  
    a: [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>  
) -> [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>

Bitwise right rotate a by BIT bits. BIT and NUM\_BITS must be determined at compile time. [Read more](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#tymethod.const_right_rotate_unsafe)

<const BIT: [usize](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/std/primitive.usize.html)
, const NUM\_BITS: [usize](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/std/primitive.usize.html)

<F>  
) -> [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>

Bitwise left rotate a by BIT bits. BIT and NUM\_BITS must be determined at compile time. [Read more](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#tymethod.const_left_rotate_unsafe)

(  
    &self,

<F>,

<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")

<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>  
) -> [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")

<F>,

#### fn [mul](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.mul)
(  
    &self,  
    ctx: &mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")
<F>,

<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>,  
    b: impl [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>  
) -> [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>

Constrains and returns `0 + a * b = out`. [Read more](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.mul)

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate.rs.html#242-254)
[](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/struct.GateChip.html#method.mul_add)

#### fn [mul\_add](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.mul_add)
(  
    &self,  
    ctx: &mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")
<F>,  
    a: impl [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>,  
    b: impl [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>,  
    c: impl [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>  
) -> [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>

Constrains and returns `a * b + c = out`. [Read more](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.mul_add)

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate.rs.html#262-273)
[](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/struct.GateChip.html#method.mul_not)

#### fn [mul\_not](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.mul_not)
(  
    &self,  
    ctx: &mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")
<F>,  
    a: impl [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>,  
    b: impl [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>  
) -> [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>

Constrains and returns `(1 - a) * b = b - a * b`. [Read more](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.mul_not)

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate.rs.html#280-282)

#### fn [assert\_bit](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.assert_bit)
(&self, ctx: &mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")
<F>, x: [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>)

Constrains that x is boolean (e.g. 0 or 1). [Read more](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.assert_bit)

(  
    &self,  
    ctx: &mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")
<F>,  
    a: impl [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>,  
    b: impl [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>  
) -> [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")

#### fn [assert\_is\_const](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.assert_is_const)
(&self, ctx: &mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")
<F>, a: &[AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>, constant: [&](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/std/primitive.reference.html)
F)

#### fn [sum](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.sum)
<Q>(  
    &self,  
    ctx: &mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")
<F>,  
    a: impl [IntoIterator](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/iter/traits/collect/trait.IntoIterator.html "trait core::iter::traits::collect::IntoIterator")
<Item = Q>  
) -> [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>where  
    Q: [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>,

Constrains and returns the sum of [QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "QuantumCell")
’s in iterator `a`. [Read more](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.sum)

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate.rs.html#397-425)
[](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/struct.GateChip.html#method.partial_sums)

#### fn [partial\_sums](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.partial_sums)
<'thread, Q>(  
    &self,  
    ctx: &'thread mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")
<F>,  
    a: impl [IntoIterator](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/iter/traits/collect/trait.IntoIterator.html "trait core::iter::traits::collect::IntoIterator")
<Item = Q>  
) -> [Box](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/alloc/boxed/struct.Box.html "struct alloc::boxed::Box")
<dyn [Iterator](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/iter/traits/iterator/trait.Iterator.html "trait core::iter::traits::iterator::Iterator")
<Item = [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>> + 'thread>where  
    Q: [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>,

Calculates and constrains the sum of the elements of `a`. [Read more](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.partial_sums)

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate.rs.html#438-460)
[](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/struct.GateChip.html#method.accumulated_product)

#### fn [accumulated\_product](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.accumulated_product)
<QA, QB>(  
    &self,  
    ctx: &mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")
<F>,  
    a: impl [IntoIterator](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/iter/traits/collect/trait.IntoIterator.html "trait core::iter::traits::collect::IntoIterator")
<Item = QA>,  
    b: impl [IntoIterator](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/iter/traits/collect/trait.IntoIterator.html "trait core::iter::traits::collect::IntoIterator")
<Item = QB>  
) -> [Vec](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/alloc/vec/struct.Vec.html "struct alloc::vec::Vec")
<[AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>>where  
    QA: [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>,  
    QB: [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>,

Calculates and constrains the accumulated product of ‘a’ and ‘b’ i.e. `x_i = b_1 * (a_1...a_{i - 1}) + b_2 * (a_2...a_{i - 1}) + ... + b_i` [Read more](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.accumulated_product)

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate.rs.html#480-502)
[](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/struct.GateChip.html#method.or)

#### fn [or](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.or)
(  
    &self,  
    ctx: &mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")
<F>,  
    a: impl [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>,  
    b: impl [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>  
) -> [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>

Constrains and returns `a || b`, assuming `a` and `b` are boolean. [Read more](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.or)

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate.rs.html#510-517)
[](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/struct.GateChip.html#method.and)

#### fn [and](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.and)
(  
    &self,  
    ctx: &mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")
<F>,  
    a: impl [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>,  
    b: impl [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>  
) -> [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>

Constrains and returns `a & b`, assumeing `a` and `b` are boolean. [Read more](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.and)

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate.rs.html#525-547)
[](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/struct.GateChip.html#method.xor)

#### fn [xor](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.xor)
(  
    &self,  
    ctx: &mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")
<F>,  
    a: impl [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>,  
    b: impl [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>  
) -> [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>

Constrains and returns `a ^ b`, assuming `a` and `b` are boolean. [Read more](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.xor)

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate.rs.html#554-556)
[](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/struct.GateChip.html#method.not)

#### fn [not](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.not)
(  
    &self,  
    ctx: &mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")
<F>,  
    a: impl [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>  
) -> [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>

Constrains and returns `!a` assumeing `a` is boolean. [Read more](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.not)

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate.rs.html#594-641)
[](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/struct.GateChip.html#method.bits_to_indicator)

#### fn [bits\_to\_indicator](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.bits_to_indicator)
(  
    &self,  
    ctx: &mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")
<F>,  
    bits: &\[[AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")\
<F>\]  
) -> [Vec](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/alloc/vec/struct.Vec.html "struct alloc::vec::Vec")
<[AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>>

Constrains and returns an indicator vector from a slice of boolean values, where `output[idx] = 1` iff idx = (the number represented by `bits` in binary little endian), otherwise `output[idx] = 0`. [Read more](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.bits_to_indicator)

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate.rs.html#649-685)
[](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/struct.GateChip.html#method.idx_to_indicator)

#### fn [idx\_to\_indicator](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.idx_to_indicator)
(  
    &self,  
    ctx: &mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")
<F>,  
    idx: impl [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>,  
    len: [usize](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/std/primitive.usize.html)
  
) -> [Vec](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/alloc/vec/struct.Vec.html "struct alloc::vec::Vec")
<[AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>>

Constrains and returns a [Vec](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/alloc/vec/struct.Vec.html "Vec")
 `indicator` of length `len`, where `indicator[i] == 1 if i == idx otherwise 0`, if `idx >= len` then `indicator` is all zeros. [Read more](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.idx_to_indicator)

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate.rs.html#694-716)
[](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/struct.GateChip.html#method.select_by_indicator)

#### fn [select\_by\_indicator](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.select_by_indicator)
<Q>(  
    &self,  
    ctx: &mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")
<F>,  
    a: impl [IntoIterator](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/iter/traits/collect/trait.IntoIterator.html "trait core::iter::traits::collect::IntoIterator")
<Item = Q>,  
    indicator: impl [IntoIterator](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/iter/traits/collect/trait.IntoIterator.html "trait core::iter::traits::collect::IntoIterator")
<Item = [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>>  
) -> [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>where  
    Q: [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>,

Constrains the inner product of `a` and `indicator` and returns `a[idx]` (e.g. the value of `a` at `idx`). [Read more](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.select_by_indicator)

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate.rs.html#724-739)
[](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/struct.GateChip.html#method.select_from_idx)

#### fn [select\_from\_idx](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.select_from_idx)
<Q>(  
    &self,  
    ctx: &mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")
<F>,  
    cells: impl [IntoIterator](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/iter/traits/collect/trait.IntoIterator.html "trait core::iter::traits::collect::IntoIterator")
<Item = Q>,  
    idx: impl [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>  
) -> [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>where  
    Q: [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>,

Constrains and returns `cells[idx]` if `idx < cells.len()`, otherwise return 0. [Read more](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.select_from_idx)

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate.rs.html#746-766)
[](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/struct.GateChip.html#method.is_zero)

#### fn [is\_zero](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.is_zero)
(&self, ctx: &mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")
<F>, a: [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>) -> [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>

Constrains that a cell is equal to 0 and returns `1` if `a = 0`, otherwise `0`. [Read more](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.is_zero)

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate.rs.html#772-780)
[](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/struct.GateChip.html#method.is_equal)

#### fn [is\_equal](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.is_equal)
(  
    &self,  
    ctx: &mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")
<F>,  
    a: impl [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>,  
    b: impl [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[QuantumCell](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/enum.QuantumCell.html "enum halo2_base::QuantumCell")
<F>>  
) -> [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>

Constrains that the value of two cells are equal: b - a = 0, returns `1` if `a = b`, otherwise `0`. [Read more](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.is_equal)

[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate.rs.html#806-844)
[](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/struct.GateChip.html#method.lagrange_and_eval)

#### fn [lagrange\_and\_eval](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.lagrange_and_eval)
(  
    &self,  
    ctx: &mut [Context](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.Context.html "struct halo2_base::Context")
<F>,  
    coords: &\[([AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")\
<F>, [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")\
<F>)\],  
    x: [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>  
) -> ([AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>, [AssignedValue](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/struct.AssignedValue.html "struct halo2_base::AssignedValue")
<F>)

Performs and constrains Lagrange interpolation on `coords` and evaluates the resulting polynomial at `x`. [Read more](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/flex_gate/trait.GateInstructions.html#method.lagrange_and_eval)

![Copy item path](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/clipboard.svg)


[source](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/src/halo2_base/gates/range.rs.html#26-36)
 · [\[−\]](javascript:void(0) "collapse all docs")

    pub enum RangeStrategy {
        Vertical,
    }

Expand description

Specifies the gate strategy for the range chip

Variants[](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/range/enum.RangeStrategy.html#variants)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### [](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/range/enum.RangeStrategy.html#variant.Vertical)
`Vertical`

#### [Vertical Gate Strategy:](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/range/enum.RangeStrategy.html#vertical-gate-strategy)

`q_0 * (a + b * c - d) = 0` where

*   a = value\[0\], b = value\[1\], c = value\[2\], d = value\[3\]
*   q = q\_lookup\[0\]
*   q is either 0 or 1 so this is just a simple selector

Using `a + b * c` instead of `a * b + c` allows for “chaining” of gates, i.e., the output of one gate becomes `a` in the next gate.

Trait Implementations[](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/halo2_base/gates/range/enum.RangeStrategy.html#trait-implementations)

#### fn [into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html#tymethod.into)
(self) -> U

Calls `U::from(self)`.

That is, this conversion is whatever the implementation of `[From](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.From.html "From") <T> for U` chooses to do.

    pub struct GateCircuitBuilder<F: ScalarField> {
        pub builder: RefCell<GateThreadBuilder<F>>,
        pub break_points: RefCell<MultiPhaseThreadBreakPoints>,
    }

Expand description

A wrapper struct to auto-build a circuit from a `GateThreadBuilder`.

        pub is_enabled: Column<Advice>,
        pub input_rlc: Column<Advice>,

Expand description

Keccak Table, used to verify keccak hashing from RLC’ed input.

, returning an `Instrumented` wrapper. [Read more](https://docs.rs/tracing/0.1.37/tracing/instrument/trait.Instrument.html#method.instrument)

### impl<T, U> [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<U> for Twhere  
    U: [From](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.From.html "trait core::convert::From")
<T>,

const: [unstable](https://github.com/rust-lang/rust/issues/88674 "Tracking issue for const_convert")
 · [source](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/src/core/convert/mod.rs.html#725)
[](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/zkevm_keccak/util/struct.WordParts.html#method.into)

#### fn [into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html#tymethod.into)
(self) -> U

Calls `U::from(self)`.

That is, this conversion is whatever the implementation of `[From](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.From.html "From") <T> for U` chooses to do.

#### fn [in\_current\_span](https://docs.rs/tracing/0.1.37/tracing/instrument/trait.Instrument.html#method.in_current_span)
(self) -> [Instrumented](https://docs.rs/tracing/0.1.37/tracing/instrument/struct.Instrumented.html "struct tracing::instrument::Instrumented")
<Self>

Instruments this type with the [current](https://docs.rs/tracing/0.1.37/tracing/span/struct.Span.html#method.current)
 [`Span`](https://docs.rs/tracing/0.1.37/tracing/span/struct.Span.html)
, returning an `Instrumented` wrapper. [Read more](https://docs.rs/tracing/0.1.37/tracing/instrument/trait.Instrument.html#method.in_current_span)

### impl<T, U> [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<U> for Twhere  
    U: [From](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.From.html "trait core::convert::From")
<T>,

const: [unstable](https://github.com/rust-lang/rust/issues/88674 "Tracking issue for const_convert")
 · [source](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/src/core/convert/mod.rs.html#725)
[](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/zkevm_keccak/util/eth_types/struct.AccessList.html#method.into)

#### fn [into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html#tymethod.into)
(self) -> U

Calls `U::from(self)`.

That is, this conversion is whatever the implementation of `[From](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.From.html "From") <T> for U` chooses to do.

#### pub fn [verify](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/zkevm_keccak/util/eth_types/struct.Signature.html#method.verify)
<M, A>(&self, message: M, address: A) -> [Result](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/result/enum.Result.html "enum core::result::Result")
<[()](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/std/primitive.unit.html)
, SignatureError>where  
    M: [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<RecoveryMessage>,  
    A: [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<[H160](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/zkevm_keccak/util/eth_types/struct.H160.html "struct zkevm_keccak::util::eth_types::H160")
\>,

Verifies that signature on `message` was produced by `address`

#### pub fn [recover](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/zkevm_keccak/util/eth_types/struct.Signature.html#method.recover)
<M>(&self, message: M) -> [Result](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/result/enum.Result.html "enum core::result::Result")
<[H160](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/zkevm_keccak/util/eth_types/struct.H160.html "struct zkevm_keccak::util::eth_types::H160")
, SignatureError>where  
    M: [Into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html "trait core::convert::Into")
<RecoveryMessage>,

Recovers the Ethereum address which was used to sign the given message.

Recovery signature data uses ‘Electrum’ notation, this means the `v` value is expected to be either `27` or `28`.

#### pub fn [recovery\_id](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/zkevm_keccak/util/eth_types/struct.Signature.html#method.recovery_id)
(&self) -> [Result](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/result/enum.Result.html "enum core::result::Result")
<Id, SignatureError>

Retrieve the recovery ID.

#### pub fn [to\_vec](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/zkevm_keccak/util/eth_types/struct.Signature.html#method.to_vec)

<[u8](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/std/primitive.u8.html)
, [Global](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/alloc/alloc/struct.Global.html "struct alloc::alloc::Global")
\>

Copies and serializes `self` into a new `Vec` with the recovery id included

#### fn [try\_from](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.TryFrom.html#tymethod.try_from)
(  
    bytes: &'a \[[u8](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/std/primitive.u8.html)\
\]  
) -> [Result](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/result/enum.Result.html "enum core::result::Result")
<[Signature](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/zkevm_keccak/util/eth_types/struct.Signature.html "struct zkevm_keccak::util::eth_types::Signature")
, <[Signature](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/zkevm_keccak/util/eth_types/struct.Signature.html "struct zkevm_keccak::util::eth_types::Signature")
 as [TryFrom](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.TryFrom.html "trait core::convert::TryFrom")
<&'a \[[u8](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/std/primitive.u8.html)\
\]>>::[Error](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.TryFrom.html#associatedtype.Error "type core::convert::TryFrom::Error")
\>

Parses a raw signature which is expected to be 65 bytes long where the first 32 bytes is the `r` value, the second 32 bytes the `s` value and the final byte is the `v` value in ‘Electrum’ notation.

[](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/zkevm_keccak/util/eth_types/struct.Signature.html#associatedtype.Error)

#### type [Error](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.TryFrom.html#associatedtype.Error)
 = SignatureError

The type returned in the event of a conversion error.

    pub struct H160(pub [u8; 20]);

Expand description

Fixed-size uninterpreted hash type with 20 bytes (160 bits) size.

#### pub fn [assign\_from\_slice](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/zkevm_keccak/util/eth_types/struct.H160.html#method.assign_from_slice)
(&mut self, src: &\[[u8](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/std/primitive.u8.html)\
\])

Assign the bytes from the byte slice `src` to `self`.

##### [Note](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/zkevm_keccak/util/eth_types/struct.H160.html#note)

The given bytes are interpreted in big endian order.

##### [Panics](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/zkevm_keccak/util/eth_types/struct.H160.html#panics)

If the length of `src` and the number of bytes in `self` do not match.

\]) -> [H160](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/zkevm_keccak/util/eth_types/struct.H160.html "struct zkevm_keccak::util::eth_types::H160")

Create a new fixed-hash from the given slice `src`.

##### [Note](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/zkevm_keccak/util/eth_types/struct.H160.html#note-1)

The given bytes are interpreted in big endian order.

##### [Panics](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/zkevm_keccak/util/eth_types/struct.H160.html#panics-1)

If the length of `src` and the number of bytes in `Self` do not match.

### impl [H160](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/zkevm_keccak/util/eth_types/struct.H160.html "struct zkevm_keccak::util::eth_types::H160")

Utilities using the `byteorder` crate.

#### pub fn [to\_low\_u64\_be](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/zkevm_keccak/util/eth_types/struct.H160.html#method.to_low_u64_be)
(&self) -> [u64](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/std/primitive.u64.html)

Returns the lowest 8 bytes interpreted as big-endian.

##### [Note](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/zkevm_keccak/util/eth_types/struct.H160.html#note-2)

For hash type with less than 8 bytes the missing bytes are interpreted as being zero.

#### pub fn [to\_low\_u64\_le](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/zkevm_keccak/util/eth_types/struct.H160.html#method.to_low_u64_le)
(&self) -> [u64](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/std/primitive.u64.html)

Returns the lowest 8 bytes interpreted as little-endian.

##### [Note](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/zkevm_keccak/util/eth_types/struct.H160.html#note-3)

For hash type with less than 8 bytes the missing bytes are interpreted as being zero.

#### pub fn [to\_low\_u64\_ne](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/zkevm_keccak/util/eth_types/struct.H160.html#method.to_low_u64_ne)
(&self) -> [u64](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/std/primitive.u64.html)

Returns the lowest 8 bytes interpreted as native-endian.

##### [Note](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/zkevm_keccak/util/eth_types/struct.H160.html#note-4)

For hash type with less than 8 bytes the missing bytes are interpreted as being zero.

#### pub fn [from\_low\_u64\_be](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/zkevm_keccak/util/eth_types/struct.H160.html#method.from_low_u64_be)
(val: [u64](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/std/primitive.u64.html)
) -> [H160](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/zkevm_keccak/util/eth_types/struct.H160.html "struct zkevm_keccak::util::eth_types::H160")

Creates a new hash type from the given `u64` value.

##### [Note](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/zkevm_keccak/util/eth_types/struct.H160.html#note-5)

*   The given `u64` value is interpreted as big endian.
*   Ignores the most significant bits of the given value if the hash type has less than 8 bytes.

#### pub fn [from\_low\_u64\_le](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/zkevm_keccak/util/eth_types/struct.H160.html#method.from_low_u64_le)
(val: [u64](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/std/primitive.u64.html)
) -> [H160](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/zkevm_keccak/util/eth_types/struct.H160.html "struct zkevm_keccak::util::eth_types::H160")

Creates a new hash type from the given `u64` value.

##### [Note](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/zkevm_keccak/util/eth_types/struct.H160.html#note-6)

*   The given `u64` value is interpreted as little endian.
*   Ignores the most significant bits of the given value if the hash type has less than 8 bytes.

#### pub fn [from\_low\_u64\_ne](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/zkevm_keccak/util/eth_types/struct.H160.html#method.from_low_u64_ne)
(val: [u64](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/std/primitive.u64.html)
) -> [H160](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/zkevm_keccak/util/eth_types/struct.H160.html "struct zkevm_keccak::util::eth_types::H160")

Creates a new hash type from the given `u64` value.

##### [Note](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/zkevm_keccak/util/eth_types/struct.H160.html#note-7)

*   The given `u64` value is interpreted as native endian.
*   Ignores the most significant bits of the given value if the hash type has less than 8 bytes.

#### fn [from\_str](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/str/traits/trait.FromStr.html#tymethod.from_str)
(input: &[str](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/std/primitive.str.html)
) -> [Result](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/result/enum.Result.html "enum core::result::Result")

, FromHexError>

Creates a hash type instance from the given string.

##### [Note](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/zkevm_keccak/util/eth_types/struct.H160.html#note-11)

The given input string is interpreted in big endian.

##### [Errors](https://axiom-crypto.github.io/halo2-lib/zkevm_keccak/util/eth_types/struct.H160.html#errors)

*   When encountering invalid non hex-digits
*   Upon empty string input or invalid input length in general

#### fn [into](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.Into.html#tymethod.into)
(self) -> U

Calls `U::from(self)`.

That is, this conversion is whatever the implementation of `[From](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/convert/trait.From.html "From") <T> for U` chooses to do.
